_note: Companion attachments overlay — the C-model sub-coordinate layer, keyed by PARENT lm-id (mirrors media.json / ai-authored.json). Each attachment is a file that belongs to a paper (accompanying code, a Lean proof, witness data, a worked-example set) but is NOT a standalone paper: no own lm-id, absent from the timeline and the corpus count. Files live in content/attachments/{parent-id}/ and are served under the parent's coordinate at /raw/{parent-id}/{file}. Fields: file = ascii served/stored name; orig = original filename (used as the human download name); label = human display (may be CJK); kind = examples|code|proof|data|verify|demo|core|witness|...; retired_id (optional) = the lm-id this file HELD when it was mis-filed as a standalone paper — the build reserves it forever (registry never reassigns it) and 301s /p/{retired_id}/ + /raw/{retired_id}.{ext} to the parent; retired_slug (optional) = the legacy /papers/ slug it had, also redirected to the parent. Emitted to /ai/companions.json + the reader's attachment zone at build.
